The black queen steps into the breach. If we eliminate the queen immediately. the king steps forward and can escape. Transcript: 🎼The majestic world of the Hary eagle, This bird, among the largest and most powerful eagles, reigns over its kingdom from the tree tops with a wingspan of over2 me. It commands the skies with grace and precision.Reenowned for their strength, hay Eagleagles can snatch up prey, weighing up to half their body weight, monkeys, sloths, and other tree dwelling creatures often fall victim to their powerful talons.Yet, they are not mindless predators, Hary Eagleles are devoted parents, nurturing their young for nearly two years before they venture off on their own.Despite their awe inspiring presence, Harry Eagleagles are facing threats, deforestation and hunting have dramatically dwindled their numbers, placing them on the list of near threatened species.But hope is not lost, conservation efforts are underway, striving to protect and preserve the habitats of these magnificent birds.

Title: Harpy Eagle: The Strongest Eagle in the World #shorts #viral

We take a closer look at this magnificent bird and learn some fascinating facts about its behaviour, habitat and conservation efforts.First, we'll explore the impressive size and strength of the harpy eagle. Next, we'll take a closer look at the hunting behaviour of the harpy eagle.🎼These birds are top predators and hunt a variety of prey, including monkeys, sloths and other birds. Their talons are so strong that they can crush bones with ease.This bird is truly a sight to behold as it sos through the skies with its massive wingspan and fierce gaze. The hary eagle is a threatened species due to habitat loss and hunting.🎼Did you know that the Harry Eagleagle is considered a symbol of power and strength in some indigenous cultures? Thank you for watching.

Title: Discovering the Dark Origins of the Harpy in Greek Mythology
Transcript: Harpy is a creature with the body of a bird in the head of a woman. It was said to be a personification of storm winds and was known for its swift and deadly attacks In Greek mythology, there were two main harpies, Alo and oeped. They were daughters of the seagothhams and the ocean at E. They were often depicted as fierce creatures with sharp claws and teeth. and the ability to fly at great speeds. The harpies were notorious for their habit of stealing food. In fact, the word harppy is derived from the Greek word harppy, which means to snatch.They were said to swoop down on unsuspecting victims and carry off their food or even their children. The harpies were also known for their association with punishment. In some myths, They were sent by the gods to punish mortals who had committed crimes. They were particularly associated with the punish.

Title: Coming out doesn’t make your queer identity legitimate. #asexuality

Title: It’s Chest Day & You Get Shoulder Pain!
Transcript: I'm trying to put you in the worst smooth up.Here's the story of one of my patients who came to complaints of right shoulder snapping and pain with every dumbbell bench press. The first thing I did assessed technique, I noticed in the bottom of his bench press, he had a lot of shoulder extension, meaning his elbow was dropping really far down. Now, why is this an issue. Well, whenever you're performing a dumbbell bench press or a barbell bench press. If you drop that elbow too far down and going to excessive extension. It can lead to excessive load on the front side of the shoulder, which for him was causing his symptoms because of a lack.St it's not that this is a bad exercise, but if you drop that elbow too low, it can just place a lot of load on the front side of the shoulder. So my cue for him was to set his shoulder blades into a good position by retracting them at the start of the movement. This allowed him to perform that dumbbell bench press, but with better shoulder mechanics, less stress on the front of the shoulder and no more snapping.
Label: Normal

Title: Conversion therapy survivor
Transcript: Are you gay, Maybe, what do you think. Well, I don't know. I think you are. Yeah, I'm gay. A, very from I'm from originally from Brazil. What it's like to be Brazil. It's somewhat similar to the US. I think Brazil is more advanced in fact, in terms of laws that protect LGBT people. gay marriage has been included in some of our laws. So it's not something that the Supreme Court has decide anymore. But on the other side, the families are not, especially conservative families, They're not very accepting. In my case, I had a very bad experience with my family came out several times. first time it came out. It was like.Coming out but I'm gonna try to fix it and do like therapy and stuff so I did do some like conversion therapy things as long as I was trying to get fixed they were okay with it with me trying so I wasn't actually gay in their mind I was just like going through a phase but once I came out like for real like I'm gay and I accept myself it was like a backlash for my entire family they were all against me like most of them, almost everyone.

Title: Woman texts dead father everyday, then gets a reply #facts
Transcript: Womeman texts her dead daddy every day for four years. Then one day she gets a reply and what she discovers is shocking.🎼23e year old Chastity Patterson was devastated after losing her father, and so the 23 year old would text Jason's phone every day after his death sharing updates about her life for four years. But then one day something completely unexpected would happen when she got a response. and what was revealed, shocked her to the core. My name is Brad, and I lost my daughter in a car wreck August 2014 and your messages have kept me alive. When you text me, I know it's a message from.GoI'm sorry you lost someone so close to you, but I have listened to you over the years, and I have watched you grow and go through more than anyone. I have wanted to text you back for years, but I didn't want to break your heart. You are an extraordinary woman, and I wish my daughter would have become the woman you are. Thank you for your everyday updates. You remind me that there is a God.
Label: Normal

Title: I’m so thankful to have had such an understanding supervisor! 💗 #autism #autistic #worklife #adhd
Transcript: I know I look like I'd be really nice, but I was actually a menace when I first started working full time. Turns out your coworkers don't appreciate commentary on how they could get better at their jobs. It's not my fault that other people's mistakes are just more intellectually stimulating to talk about. Besides, if I asked about their weekend plans, they tell me. And who has time for all that. I don't. So probably tired of my nonsense and maybe tired of getting complaints. My supervisor made me a deal. I could text her all of my rude thoughts as long as I didn't.😊Say them out loud In return, she promised to give some sort of response, even if it was just like a string of empathetic emojis. few months of keeping this arrangement resulted in two things.1 increased self-awareness, slowing down to type your thoughts because you might get in trouble for saying the wrong ones out loud really forces you to think before you speak and two, improvement in my workplace relationships being more thoughtful about what I let come out of my mouth gave me space to have more conventional interactions, even if it was under the threat of punishment.
Label: Normal

Title: Heart Shape Swiss Roll Cake🩷🍰 #cake #shorts
Transcript: Today, I made a heartshaped Swiss roll cake and never made this before and just crossed my fingers that it would turn out. I started by making the pattern mixture and kept it super simple with pink hearts. while that was chilling in the fridge, I mixed together the cake batter and I added pink food color into that as well. After that, I had to whip up a moringgue. and I messed it up on the first try, but made it correctly the second time. So that's what count. I gently folded that into the cake batter and poured it onto my pattern. I smoothed it out, popped it in the oven. And just like that, it baked. and I had to roll it up.Right away, so at one crack, as you can see, I was very excited it came out in one piece while that's completely cooling. I cut up my raspberries and made my whip cream filling. and this is my strong suit working with frosting. so I was very excited to fill this cake and put all the raspberries in. Then I had to reroll it into the official heart shape and let it chill in the fridge for four hours, which was not fun because I just wanted to eat it right away, but I was definitely worth the weight. It ended up looking orangey on camera, but I swear it's pink. I had the best time making it and an even better time eating it.😊
Label: Normal

Title: Who Made The Pride Flag? Queer History 101 #shorts
Transcript: 🎼Welcome to Queer History 101 Part 3. We all know the Rainbow flag as the symbol of the LGBTQ+ community. But why the Rainbow flag was created in 1978 by artist, veteran and drag performer Gilbert Baker He was commissioned to create a flag with San Diego's pride paradeade by another gay icon politician Harvey Mil, The different colorss within the flag are intended to represent togetherness Since LGBTQ people come in all races, ages and genders and Rabows are both natural and beautiful. The original flag featured8 colors.Each having a different meaning, hot pink for sex, red for life, orange for healing, yellow for sunlight, green for nature, herpoise for art, indigo for harmony violet for spirit, Sun flags added black and brown stripes to honor black and brown members of the community. A recent update is the progress flag which featureses the Chevron to the side of the original flag to honor trans as well as black and brown community members.😊

Title: One Minute With Nature's Scariest Eagle: Harpy Eagle
Transcript: The Hary Eagleagle is one of the most powerful and largest rappttors globally this bird is found in the sparsely inhabited rainforests of Central and South America.It is perhaps one of the most intimidating birds in the world with its retractable feather crown and razor sharp talons that are about four to five inches, just the same as a grizzly bear's claw.Those talons give the hary enough power and grip to lift prey up to their own weight This eagle is a silent predator that glides across the forest like a stealth drone despite its wingspan reaching up to6 and a half feet.Harpies feed on sloths, oposssums and monkeys, instead of migrating, they stay in one place and establish their territory.Monogamous and with a lifespan of 35 to 45 years, a bonded pair may stay together for 25 to 30 years.
Label: Normal

Title: MATA HARI - FROM COURTESAN TO DOUBLE AGENT

Title: The Life and Death of Diana Dors
Transcript: ？🎼Diana Doris was born on October 23,1931 in Swindon, Wiltshire, England. Her birth name was Diana Mary Fuck. I can see why studios wanted her to change her last name. Shes known for being an actress, model, author and singer. She hated being called the British Marin Monroe. But let's face it. She was the British Marin Monroe. She was a blonde bombshell who kept the tabloids busy. She won a beauty contest at age 13 and started acting. She appeared older than she was. Her roles slowly got better. She started many British film.TV shows and plays before moving to Hollywood. She'd go back to England and appear in movies and come back to Hollywood a lot. Her second husband was Richard Dawson, who would later host the game show called the Family Feud. She always remained captivating even in her older years. She recorded a solo album and made a few songs for soundtracks. She was married three times and had three children. She died in 1984 from ovarian cancer. Her last husband named Alllan Lake, so distraught that he committed suicide five months after she died. She was 52 years old.
Label: Normal

Title: Random woman holds child, but the truth behind picture makes people cry #fact
Transcript: 🎼This is a random woman holding a child on a plane, but the truth behind this photo made people cry. Title: How to not hurt your lower back on deadlift
Transcript: 🎼.One of the most crucial factors to the deadlift is your initial setup it will make or break the exercise and pretty much determine long term if you're gonna get injured from the deadlift or not two main things you want to consider when you're setting up for deadlift first off, it's a distance between the bar and your shins you want this to be ideally as close to your shins as possible when you pull up just before you even begin, you want the bar to be close to your shins if not just right directly through your midfoot, and the second factor is why I call pulling the slack out of the barn, which looks and sounds like this.You hear that, notice how the bar.Kind of makes a little bit of noise. That is slack being pulled out the bar. If you don't pull the slack out of the bar, you're going to be kind jerking the weight up and it makes it a lot easier for you to lose your brace. So instead you come down, have the bar close to your foot, take a deep breath.Pull slack out, that.
Label: Normal

Title: The Harpy Eagle
Transcript: 🎼The Hary Eagleagle is one of the largest and most powerful eagles in the world, with a wingspan of up to 7 feet and a weight of up to 20. They are found in Central and South America, and their range includes the Amazon rainforest.The Harry Eagle is a top predator in its ecosystem and is known for its incredible hunting skills.🎼They are capable of taking down prey as large as monkeys, sloths and even deer. They are named after the haries of Greek mythology, which were mythical creatures with the head of a woman and the body of a bird.Hary Eagleagles have large and powerful talents that can be up to5 inches long, which they use to catch and kill their prey.🎼They have a distinctive crest of feathers on their head that they can raise and lower communicate with other eagles. Hary eagles are considered a threatened species due to habitat loss and hunting.While they are generally not a threat to humans, Hary Eagleagles have been known to attack people who encroach on their territory or threaten their young.
Label: Normal

Title: Discover the Harpy Eagle: A Mighty Predator of the Amazon
Transcript: 🎼Deep in the heart of the Amazon rainforest lives a creature that inspires awe and fear in equal measure. Meet the Harrpy eagle, one of the largest and most powerful birds of prey in the world.With a wingspan of up to7 feet and a weight of up to 20 pounds, the Harrpy eagle is a formidable predator that rules the canopy of the forest.🎼Its talons are among the largest and strongest of any bird, capable of crushing bones and tearing flesh with ease. The Harrpy Eagleles's diet consists mainly of sloths, monkeys, and other mammals that inhabit the treetops.Its hunting strategy is to ambush its prey from above, using its powerful wings and sharp eyesight to surprise and overwhelm them.🎼Despite its size and power, the Harrpy eagle is a rare and elusive creature that is seldom seen by humans, but its presence in the forest is a sign of a healthy ecosystem where predators and prey coexist in a delicate balance.

Title: Minor Decoy Program
Transcript: Have you ever been annoyed by a server or bartender asking for your ID Well here's why they do it Okay I was a server for 23 years most of it in California and in California they have the alcoholic beverage control This department has something called the minor decoy program where they get people that are under age 20 and the undercover cop will go in with this minor decoy and order an alcoholic drink from a bartender or server in the US you have to be 21 years old right so the under 20 person order and if you are the server,Or the bartender and you don't make sure they have a legal ID before serving them the drink You're busted This is what happens The undercover cop will then make you reenact handing the drink to the minor decoy and they take a photo of it for everybody to see and then you are fine It's misdemeanor you're fine Also the bar or restaurant gets fine So don't be offended particularly in California and if this happens in another states let me know but the server or bartender is probably scared that they're gonna get fined or whatever so That's it.

Title: Singapore lifts ban on gay sex - so why are LGBT activists unhappy?
Transcript: 🎼Singapore has lifted a ban on gay sex so why are some LGBT activists unhappy after years of debate a controversial law known as 377A has been scrapped, basically making it legal to be homosexual This will bring the law into line with current social models and I hope provide some relief.😊Who gay Singaporeans.🎼LGBT rights groups celebrated, but they also raised concerns about this Under the law only marriages between one man and one woman are recognizedd in Singapore in the same speech, the Prime minister said that the Constitution would be changed to keep marriage between a man and a woman to reflect Singapore's conservative values LGBT activists said this was really disappointing and will make it harder for same-sex marriage to ever be legalised Some Singaporeans argue that since37.7A hasn't been enforced in years. The country hadn't actually made any progress.
